raven_feather.name: Raven Feather
raven_feather.description: A feather carried by the midnight wind.

ancient_wood.name: Ancient Wood
ancient_wood.description: Wood from trees older than memory.

moon_dust.name: Moon Dust
moon_dust.description: Dust that glimmers beneath the moon.

night_bloom.name: Night Bloom
night_bloom.description: A flower that only blossoms beneath moonlight.

dream_moth_wing.name: Dream Moth Wing
dream_moth_wing.description: Soft wings that shimmer like distant stars.

forgotten_candle.name: Forgotten Candle
forgotten_candle.description: Its flame never seems to go out.

lunar_fang.name: Lunar Fang
lunar_fang.description: A fang from a beast that hunts beneath the full moon.

eclipse_shard.name: Eclipse Shard
eclipse_shard.description: A fragment left behind when the sun and moon embraced.

starlit_thread.name: Starlit Thread
starlit_thread.description: Thread spun from fragments of constellations.

echo_crystal.name: Echo Crystal
echo_crystal.description: A crystal that remembers every whisper it hears.
